summary: Set 049 Session 2 shipped the core ai_router coordination rip-out per spec §5 S2, implementing operator-locked premises P1-P5 + audit-locked dispositions T1-T7 / D1-D3 across the Python surface. Net diff: -2916 lines (3266 deletions, 350 insertions) across 14 files. Writer reshape: register_session_start emits a 4-field omit-null orchestrator block (engine/provider/model/effort); orchestrator_chat_session_id parameter + same-holder re-attach + checkedOutAt + lastActivityAt all removed. start_session CLI rip: EXIT_CHECKOUT_CONFLICT/EXIT_READ_ONLY constants, _coordination_enforced/_identity_label/_prompt_takeover_choice/_log_force_override/_resolve_chat_session_id helpers, the ~100-line H3+H4 refusal branch, and --force flag all deleted; --chat-session-id retained with T2 accept-with-warning stderr line; --model/--effort made optional with no 'unknown' default per T3; _log_session_start adds a generic 'start_session ran' record per T5 (writer log file retained). new_chat_id.py whole-file retired (no preservation; T2 doesn't require survival). close_session.py: _peek_orchestrator_identity drops chatSessionId from audit payload per P3. joiner/conflicts.py: detect_engine_mismatch + detect_bare_or_stale_touch deleted (D1+D2 retired); ConflictKind narrowed to Literal['writer-bypass']; module + detector docstring reframed as engine-independent writer-discipline check (D3 decoupled). T6 holder_change/checkout_conflict event emit is a no-op: those event-type strings were never emitted by any code path in this repo. dump_session_state_schema.build_example_state + committed reference regenerated to match 4-field omit-null shape. Pre-flight §4 survey ruled out blockers across the webview protocol shape, HarvestService, consumer-repo hooks (zero callers in platform/harvester/homehealthcare-accessdb), and the schema artifact (added inline to S2). Tests: 4 whole-file retires (test_chatsessionid_writer + test_checkout_writer + test_start_session_takeover_prompt + test_new_chat_id); test_joiner_conflicts.py rewritten to cover only writer-bypass; test_session_state_v4_writers.py + test_no_router_backcompat.py updated for the new surface. 952 ai_router tests pass + 1 skip + 0 regressions. The pre-existing ai_router/scripts/test_dump_session_state_schema.py collection error is NOT Set-049-caused (confirmed via git stash comparison). Deferred per locked arc: S3 ships hook reduction + migrator T4 sweep+normalize + schema-doc Writer Contract; S4 ships TS surface cleanup + Explorer revert + cross-repo-checkout-notice rewrite; S5 ships docs + dual version bumps + UAT + close-out.

reason.specifics: S2 closes with the core ai_router rip-out done and the Python surface clean. Per the locked spec §5, S3 picks up the writer-side cleanup + migration sweep: claude-session-start-invoker.js hook reduction (drop --chat-session-id forwarding + EXIT_CHECKOUT_CONFLICT handling + emitConflictRecord + checkout-conflicts directory write), migrate_v3_to_v4.py T4 extension (strip the 3 retired fields from existing orchestrator blocks, idempotent on already-clean v4 files, .bak rollback preserved), and docs/session-state-schema.md rewrite with a Writer Contract section per T3. Verification: Round A. Operator chooses when to start S3.
